title: Salty Indian Sirloin Steak Tips
description: A tender and nostalgic dish featuring sirloin steak tips in a creamy, dairy-free sauce that is perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 lb (450g) sirloin steak tips
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp coconut oil or vegan butter substitute
2 tbsp tomato paste or vegan tomato sauce
1 can (6 oz) coconut milk or almond milk

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the oil and swirl to coat.
Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Season the steak tips with salt and pepper on both sides, then add them to the pan. Cook for about 1-2 minutes per side or until browned.
Pour in the vegetable broth, tomato paste, cumin, smoked paprika, turmeric, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover with a lid, and simmer for about 15 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk or almond milk and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until thickened.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish with steamed vegetables.
